---
title: "Running Progress"
date: now
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY h:mm A"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: darkly
    orientation: rows
    self-contained: true
    scrolling: true
---

```{python}
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
from pathlib import Path
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

# ── Configuration ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Adjust these to match your HR zones and goals.

ZONE2_LOW = 120            # Zone 2 HR lower bound (bpm)
ZONE2_HIGH = 150           # Zone 2 HR upper bound (bpm)
MIN_MONTHLY_MILES = 25     # Minimum effective training month
TARGET_MONTHLY_MILES = 50  # Target monthly mileage
ROLLING_SHORT = 30         # Short rolling window (days)
ROLLING_LONG = 90          # Long rolling window (days)

# 10K readiness scorecard thresholds
MILEAGE_GREEN = 30         # 30-day mileage green threshold
MILEAGE_YELLOW = 20        # 30-day mileage yellow threshold
PACE_GREEN = 13.0          # Zone 2 pace green (min/mi, lower = better)
PACE_YELLOW = 14.5         # Zone 2 pace yellow
STREAK_GREEN = 3           # Month streak green threshold
STREAK_YELLOW = 1          # Month streak yellow threshold

DATA_DIR = Path("data")
STREAMS_DIR = DATA_DIR / "activity-streams"

# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def parse_pace(pace_str):
    """Convert 'M:SS' pace string to decimal minutes."""
    if not pace_str or (isinstance(pace_str, float) and np.isnan(pace_str)):
        return np.nan
    parts = str(pace_str).split(":")
    if len(parts) != 2:
        return np.nan
    try:
        return int(parts[0]) + int(parts[1]) / 60
    except ValueError:
        return np.nan

def format_pace(minutes):
    """Convert decimal minutes to 'M:SS' string."""
    if pd.isna(minutes):
        return "--"
    m = int(minutes)
    s = int(round((minutes - m) * 60))
    if s == 60:
        m += 1
        s = 0
    return f"{m}:{s:02d}"

def traffic_light(value, green_thresh, yellow_thresh, lower_is_better=False):
    """Return Quarto valuebox color string."""
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "secondary"
    if lower_is_better:
        if value <= green_thresh:
            return "success"
        elif value <= yellow_thresh:
            return "warning"
        return "danger"
    else:
        if value >= green_thresh:
            return "success"
        elif value >= yellow_thresh:
            return "warning"
        return "danger"

# ── Load Data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

runs = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "strava-runs-summary.csv")
runs["date"] = pd.to_datetime(runs["date"])
runs["pace_numeric"] = runs["avg_pace_per_mile"].apply(parse_pace)
runs["month"] = runs["date"].dt.to_period("M")

soccer = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "strava-soccer-summary.csv")
soccer["date"] = pd.to_datetime(soccer["date"])
soccer["month"] = soccer["date"].dt.to_period("M")

# ── Zone 2 Pace Calculation ─────────────────────────────────────
# Stream-based (precise): filter per-second data to zone 2 HR, average pace.
# Estimate (fallback): for runs without streams where avg HR is in zone 2,
# use avg_pace_per_mile as a proxy.

z2_records = []
stream_files = sorted(STREAMS_DIR.glob("*.csv")) if STREAMS_DIR.exists() else []
stream_activity_ids = set()

for f in stream_files:
    parts = f.stem.split("-")
    activity_id = int(parts[-1])
    run_date = pd.Timestamp(f"{parts[0]}-{parts[1]}-{parts[2]}")
    stream_activity_ids.add(activity_id)

    sdf = pd.read_csv(f)
    sdf["heartrate"] = pd.to_numeric(sdf["heartrate"], errors="coerce")
    sdf["pace_numeric"] = sdf["pace_per_mile"].apply(parse_pace)

    z2 = sdf[
        (sdf["heartrate"] >= ZONE2_LOW)
        & (sdf["heartrate"] <= ZONE2_HIGH)
        & sdf["pace_numeric"].notna()
        & (sdf["pace_numeric"] > 0)
        & (sdf["pace_numeric"] < 20)
    ]

    if len(z2) >= 30:
        z2_records.append({
            "date": run_date,
            "z2_pace": z2["pace_numeric"].mean(),
            "z2_seconds": len(z2),
            "source": "stream",
        })

for _, row in runs.iterrows():
    aid = row.get("activity_id")
    if pd.notna(aid) and int(aid) in stream_activity_ids:
        continue
    if (
        pd.notna(row["avg_heartrate"])
        and ZONE2_LOW <= row["avg_heartrate"] <= ZONE2_HIGH
        and pd.notna(row["pace_numeric"])
        and 5 < row["pace_numeric"] < 20
    ):
        z2_records.append({
            "date": row["date"],
            "z2_pace": row["pace_numeric"],
            "z2_seconds": row.get("duration_seconds", 0),
            "source": "estimate",
        })

z2_df = pd.DataFrame(z2_records) if z2_records else pd.DataFrame(
    columns=["date", "z2_pace", "z2_seconds", "source"]
)
z2_monthly = pd.Series(dtype=float)
if not z2_df.empty:
    z2_df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(z2_df["date"])
    z2_df["month"] = z2_df["date"].dt.to_period("M")
    z2_monthly = z2_df.groupby("month")["z2_pace"].mean()

# ── Monthly Volume ───────────────────────────────────────────────

all_months = pd.period_range(
    start=runs["date"].min(), end=runs["date"].max(), freq="M"
)
run_monthly = (
    runs.groupby("month")["distance_miles"].sum().reindex(all_months, fill_value=0)
)
soccer_monthly = soccer.groupby("month").size().reindex(all_months, fill_value=0)

# ── Month Streak (consecutive months >= MIN_MONTHLY_MILES) ──────

streak = 0
for m in reversed(all_months):
    if run_monthly.get(m, 0) >= MIN_MONTHLY_MILES:
        streak += 1
    else:
        break

# ── Rolling Mileage ──────────────────────────────────────────────

daily_runs_dict = runs.groupby(runs["date"].dt.date)["distance_miles"].sum().to_dict()
date_range = pd.date_range(
    start=runs["date"].min().normalize(),
    end=runs["date"].max().normalize(),
    freq="D",
)
daily = pd.DataFrame({"date": date_range})
daily["miles"] = daily["date"].map(lambda d: daily_runs_dict.get(d.date(), 0))
daily["rolling_30d"] = daily["miles"].rolling(ROLLING_SHORT, min_periods=1).sum()
daily["rolling_90d"] = daily["miles"].rolling(ROLLING_LONG, min_periods=1).sum()

# ── Cardiac Drift ────────────────────────────────────────────────

drift_records = []
for f in stream_files:
    parts = f.stem.split("-")
    run_date = pd.Timestamp(f"{parts[0]}-{parts[1]}-{parts[2]}")

    sdf = pd.read_csv(f)
    sdf["heartrate"] = pd.to_numeric(sdf["heartrate"], errors="coerce")
    sdf["pace_numeric"] = sdf["pace_per_mile"].apply(parse_pace)

    running = sdf[
        sdf["heartrate"].notna()
        & sdf["pace_numeric"].notna()
        & (sdf["pace_numeric"] > 0)
        & (sdf["pace_numeric"] < 20)
    ]

    if len(running) < 120:
        continue

    mid = len(running) // 2
    hr_first = running.iloc[:mid]["heartrate"].mean()
    hr_second = running.iloc[mid:]["heartrate"].mean()

    if hr_first > 0:
        drift_records.append({
            "date": run_date,
            "drift_pct": round((hr_second - hr_first) / hr_first * 100, 1),
        })

drift_df = pd.DataFrame(drift_records) if drift_records else pd.DataFrame(
    columns=["date", "drift_pct"]
)
if not drift_df.empty:
    drift_df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(drift_df["date"])

# ── Scorecard Metrics ────────────────────────────────────────────

current_30d = daily["rolling_30d"].iloc[-1] if len(daily) > 0 else 0

if not z2_df.empty:
    recent_z2 = z2_df.sort_values("date", ascending=False).head(3)["z2_pace"].mean()
else:
    recent_z2 = np.nan
```

## Row

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "30-Day Mileage"
dict(
    icon="speedometer2",
    color=traffic_light(current_30d, MILEAGE_GREEN, MILEAGE_YELLOW),
    value=f"{current_30d:.1f} mi",
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Zone 2 Pace (last 3 runs)"
dict(
    icon="heart-pulse",
    color=traffic_light(recent_z2, PACE_GREEN, PACE_YELLOW, lower_is_better=True),
    value=format_pace(recent_z2) + " /mi",
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Month Streak (≥25 mi)"
dict(
    icon="calendar-check",
    color=traffic_light(streak, STREAK_GREEN, STREAK_YELLOW),
    value=f"{streak} mo",
)
```

## Row

### Zone 2 Pace Efficiency

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()

if not z2_df.empty:
    estimates = z2_df[z2_df["source"] == "estimate"]
    streams_pts = z2_df[z2_df["source"] == "stream"]

    if not estimates.empty:
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=estimates["date"], y=estimates["z2_pace"],
            mode="markers",
            name="Estimated (avg HR in zone 2)",
            marker=dict(size=6, color="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"),
            text=estimates["z2_pace"].apply(format_pace),
            hovertemplate="%{x|%b %d, %Y}<br>Pace: %{text}<extra></extra>",
        ))

    if not streams_pts.empty:
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=streams_pts["date"], y=streams_pts["z2_pace"],
            mode="markers",
            name="Stream-based (precise)",
            marker=dict(size=9, color="#00d4aa", symbol="diamond"),
            text=streams_pts["z2_pace"].apply(format_pace),
            hovertemplate="%{x|%b %d, %Y}<br>Pace: %{text}<extra></extra>",
        ))

    if not z2_monthly.empty:
        monthly_x = z2_monthly.index.to_timestamp() + pd.Timedelta(days=15)
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=monthly_x, y=z2_monthly.values,
            mode="lines+markers",
            name="Monthly average",
            line=dict(color="#00d4aa", width=3),
            marker=dict(size=11),
            text=[format_pace(p) for p in z2_monthly.values],
            hovertemplate="%{x|%b %Y}<br>Avg: %{text}<extra></extra>",
        ))

if not z2_df.empty:
    y_lo = int(z2_df["z2_pace"].min()) - 1
    y_hi = int(z2_df["z2_pace"].max()) + 2
else:
    y_lo, y_hi = 8, 18

fig.update_layout(
    template="plotly_dark",
    height=450,
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    yaxis=dict(
        title="Pace (min/mi)",
        autorange="reversed",
        tickvals=list(range(y_lo, y_hi + 1)),
        ticktext=[f"{m}:00" for m in range(y_lo, y_hi + 1)],
        gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
    ),
    xaxis=dict(gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    xaxis_title="",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="right", x=1),
    margin=dict(t=40, b=50, l=60, r=20),
    hovermode="closest",
    annotations=[dict(
        text="Faster is up. Dots = individual runs, line = monthly average.",
        xref="paper", yref="paper", x=0.01, y=0.01,
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=11, color="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)"),
    )],
)
fig
```

## Row

### Monthly Volume + Consistency

```{python}
fig = make_subplots(specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]])

month_labels = [m.start_time.strftime("%b '%y") for m in all_months]

streak_start_idx = max(0, len(all_months) - streak) if streak > 0 else len(all_months)
bar_colors = []
for i, m in enumerate(all_months):
    miles = run_monthly.get(m, 0)
    in_streak = streak > 0 and i >= streak_start_idx
    if miles >= TARGET_MONTHLY_MILES:
        bar_colors.append("#00d4aa")
    elif miles >= MIN_MONTHLY_MILES and in_streak:
        bar_colors.append("#4dabf7")
    elif miles >= MIN_MONTHLY_MILES:
        bar_colors.append("rgba(77,171,247,0.4)")
    else:
        bar_colors.append("rgba(255,255,255,0.12)")

fig.add_trace(
    go.Bar(
        x=month_labels, y=run_monthly.values,
        name="Running miles", marker_color=bar_colors,
        hovertemplate="%{x}<br>%{y:.1f} mi<extra></extra>",
    ),
    secondary_y=False,
)

fig.add_trace(
    go.Scatter(
        x=month_labels, y=soccer_monthly.values,
        mode="lines+markers", name="Soccer sessions",
        line=dict(color="orange", width=2),
        marker=dict(size=5, color="orange"),
        hovertemplate="%{x}<br>%{y} sessions<extra></extra>",
    ),
    secondary_y=True,
)

fig.add_hline(
    y=MIN_MONTHLY_MILES, line_dash="dash",
    line_color="rgba(255,255,0,0.3)",
    annotation_text=f"{MIN_MONTHLY_MILES} mi min",
    annotation_position="top left", secondary_y=False,
)
fig.add_hline(
    y=TARGET_MONTHLY_MILES, line_dash="dash",
    line_color="rgba(0,212,170,0.3)",
    annotation_text=f"{TARGET_MONTHLY_MILES} mi target",
    annotation_position="top left", secondary_y=False,
)

if streak > 0:
    mid_idx = len(all_months) - (streak + 1) // 2
    fig.add_annotation(
        x=month_labels[mid_idx],
        y=max(run_monthly.values) * 1.08,
        text=f"{streak}-month streak",
        showarrow=False,
        font=dict(size=12, color="#4dabf7", weight="bold"),
    )

fig.update_layout(
    template="plotly_dark",
    height=400,
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="right", x=1),
    margin=dict(t=40, b=60),
    xaxis=dict(tickangle=-45, gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    hovermode="x",
)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Miles", secondary_y=False, gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)")
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Sessions", secondary_y=True, showgrid=False)
fig
```

### Rolling Mileage

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()

fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=daily["date"], y=daily["rolling_90d"],
    mode="lines", name=f"{ROLLING_LONG}-day",
    line=dict(color="#ff6b6b", width=2),
    hovertemplate="%{x|%b %d, %Y}<br>%{y:.1f} mi<extra></extra>",
))

fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=daily["date"], y=daily["rolling_30d"],
    mode="lines", name=f"{ROLLING_SHORT}-day",
    line=dict(color="#4dabf7", width=2),
    hovertemplate="%{x|%b %d, %Y}<br>%{y:.1f} mi<extra></extra>",
))

building = daily["rolling_30d"] >= daily["rolling_90d"]
changes = building.ne(building.shift()).cumsum()
for seg_id in changes.unique():
    mask = changes == seg_id
    seg = daily[mask]
    if len(seg) < 2:
        continue
    fig.add_vrect(
        x0=seg["date"].iloc[0], x1=seg["date"].iloc[-1],
        fillcolor="rgba(0,212,170,0.07)" if building[mask].iloc[0] else "rgba(255,107,107,0.07)",
        line_width=0, layer="below",
    )

fig.update_layout(
    template="plotly_dark",
    height=400,
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    yaxis=dict(title="Miles", gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    xaxis=dict(gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="right", x=1),
    margin=dict(t=40, b=60),
    hovermode="x unified",
    annotations=[dict(
        text="Green = building (30d > 90d). Red = declining.",
        xref="paper", yref="paper", x=0.5, y=-0.15,
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=11, color="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)"),
    )],
)
fig
```

## Row

### Cardiac Drift Analysis

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()

if not drift_df.empty:
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=drift_df["date"], y=drift_df["drift_pct"],
        mode="markers+lines", name="Cardiac drift",
        marker=dict(size=10, color="#ff6b6b"),
        line=dict(color="rgba(255,107,107,0.4)", width=1),
        hovertemplate="%{x|%b %d, %Y}<br>Drift: %{y:.1f}%<extra></extra>",
    ))

    if len(drift_df) >= 3:
        x_num = drift_df["date"].astype("int64") / 1e18
        z = np.polyfit(x_num, drift_df["drift_pct"], 1)
        p = np.poly1d(z)
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=drift_df["date"], y=p(x_num),
            mode="lines", name="Trend",
            line=dict(color="#4dabf7", width=2, dash="dash"),
        ))

    fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dot", line_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)")
else:
    fig.add_annotation(
        x=0.5, y=0.5, xref="paper", yref="paper",
        text="No stream data available for drift analysis",
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=14, color="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)"),
    )

fig.update_layout(
    template="plotly_dark",
    height=400,
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    yaxis=dict(title="Drift %", gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    xaxis=dict(gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="right", x=1),
    margin=dict(t=40, b=60),
    hovermode="closest",
    annotations=[dict(
        text="Drift = (2nd-half HR - 1st-half HR) / 1st-half HR. Lower = better aerobic fitness.",
        xref="paper", yref="paper", x=0.5, y=-0.15,
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=11, color="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)"),
    )],
)
fig
```
